description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden shelving unit with a two-tone finish, featuring a dark brown wood top and a white painted body. The front side has two open shelves for storage or display, backed by vertical wooden planks that add a rustic touch. Below the shelves, there are two pull-out drawers with round metal handles, providing additional concealed storage. The sides are plain and painted white, while the back is constructed from natural wood panels with visible mounting hardware, suggesting it can be secured to a wall. The overall design is classic and functional, suitable for use in urban environments such as entryways, living rooms, or even retail spaces. The sturdy construction and flat top surface allow for the placement of decorative items or everyday objects.
description: A two-tone wooden shelving unit with open shelves, two drawers, and a flat top, featuring a rustic back panel and metal handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing two open shelves, two drawers with round handles, and a decorative top edge.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the flat, white-painted side panel and the overhanging brown wood top.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing natural wood paneling and mounting hardware for wall attachment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain white-painted side and the wood top.
